features: 【Upgraded Ultra-bright 10 LED Beads, More Brighter】Traditional solar ground lights are equipped with only 8 LED beads per unit, but we have boldly upgraded to 10 high-performance LED beads. This means higher brightness and a wider lighting range. If you need outstanding garden lighting effects, choosing this product will surely surprise you!

【Innovative Upgrade -2 Installation Methods】Our newly upgraded solar outdoor lights supports screws mounting, or ground stake installation, and can be directly placed on stair steps, transforming into practical stair lights and deck lights. By rotating the accessories on the back and using the attached screws, the lights can be easily fixed on wooden floor or suitable cement surface. Multiple lights can be combined to easily create a set of decorative lighting for outdoor areas, lighting up every outdoor corner of yours.

【IP65 Waterproof】 This LED garden lights solar powered waterproof is made of high-quality materials. The solar panel components are sealed with a gel, and there are tight waterproof plugs inside the light, which gives it an IP65 waterproof rating, effectively prevent water and fog. Even in heavy rain, you don't have to worry about damage. It is very suitable for garden, sidewalk, and other outdoor areas.

【Energy-saving】Solar energy is the cleanest energy source, with zero electricity costs. Saves money and protects the earth. No maintenance, outside solar lights can be used permanently after a one-time installation. After turning on the switch and inserting it into the ground. As long as there is sufficient sunlight, it can work reliably for you in the evening. Moreover, due to its IP65 waterproof rating, it will not be damaged even in rainy weather.

【Wireless and Safe, Versatile Functions】 Suolita outdoor solar garden light features a wireless design, so you don't have to worry about children tripping over wires when they play in the backyard and other places. It can illuminate remote areas where there are no sockets or where wiring is difficult. The solar lawn lights illuminate the walkways and courtyards when you are running or coming home, giving you a full sense of security. It also enables your family to enjoy outdoor activities such as summer barbecues. In addition, this light can mark paths and lawn edges, illuminate plants, and is an ideal decoration for flower, terrace, etc.

【Automatic Lighting】This outside garden solar lights is powered by solar energy. It charges in the sunlight during the day and will provide warm and bright light at night. It is completely automatic, greatly saving energy, and requires no manual operation or maintenance. Remember to turn on the switch and insert it into the ground to achieve the best results.
description: Product Description Upgraded 10LEDs Solar Ground Light for Outdoor Use Newly Upgraded Design - Supports Installation on Stairs, Wall, Deck By rotating the accessories on the back and using the attached screws, the lights can be easily fixed on the wall, achieving multi - function with one light. Multiple lights can be combined to easily create a set of decorative lighting for outdoor areas, lighting up every outdoor corner of yours.
